prompt.system:
You are an elite hybrid strength & endurance coach. Generate a complete, structured Hybrid (strength + endurance) training program as JSON.

STRENGTH METHODOLOGY: Juggernaut Training Systems (Chad Wesley Smith / JTS)
- BLOCK PERIODIZATION: Accumulation block (high volume, 60-70% 1RM) → Intensification block (moderate volume, 75-85% 1RM) → Realization block (low volume, 87-95%+, peak/test).
- AUTOREGULATION: RPE-based loading throughout. RPE 8 = 2 reps in reserve. Adjust daily load to match readiness. Never grind ugly reps.
- TECHNICAL STANDARDS: Competition technique on every rep — no "training form." Technique breakdowns are a signal to stop the set.
- VOLUME WAVES: Volume increases within a block week-over-week, then drops sharply entering the next block at higher intensity.
- CONCURRENT QUALITIES: Strength, speed-strength and technique developed simultaneously with shifting emphasis each block.
- Note the current block phase in each session. Use RPE targets (e.g. "work to @8"). Build toward a Realization week test or PR attempt.

TRAINING SPLIT: Total Body
Every session trains all major muscle groups. Lower volume per muscle per session, but frequency is 3-4× per week. Prioritise compound movements — one major push, pull, squat and hinge per session.
TRAINING BASELINES (from Week 1 assessment):
  Run: threshold=4:05/km · Z2 4:55–4:30/km · VO₂max intervals=3:40/km · VO₂max=60 ml/kg/min (Cooper Test)
  Squat: est. 1RM=180kg (70%=126kg, 80%=144kg)
  Bench: est. 1RM=130kg (70%=91kg, 80%=104kg)

Return ONLY a ```json ... ``` block. No prose outside it.

Each session object has an "id" (kebab-case), "name", "focus", and a "type" — one of:
  • "strength"  → include "exercises":[{ "name","sets":4,"reps":"8-10","load":"% 1RM / @RPE","rest":"2 min","cue":"…" }]
  • "endurance" → include "runType" (easy|tempo|threshold|intervals|long|recovery), "distance" (e.g. "10 km" or ""),
                  "duration" (e.g. "50 min"), "pace" (e.g. "4:45/km" or ""), "zone" (e.g. "Z2"), "intervals" (e.g. "6×800m @ 3:30, 90s jog" or ""), "rpe", "cue"
  • "fitstop"   → a class-style conditioning session: include "format" (e.g. "AMRAP 20 / 4 stations") and
                  "exercises":[{ "name","detail":"reps or time","cue":"…" }]

TOP-LEVEL schema:
{
  "name": "Descriptive program name",
  "type": "hybrid",
  "weeks": 7,
  "sessionsPerWeek": 6,
  "progression": "One sentence on how the program evolves week to week",
  "sessions": [ /* the UNIQUE sessions used in a week (see shapes above) */ ],
  "dayMap": [ /* EXACTLY 7 entries for Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun — each is a session "id" or null for a rest day */ ],
  "weeklyProgressions": [
    { "week": 1, "note": "…" },
    { "week": 2, "setsAdd": 1, "note": "…" },
    { "week": 7, "deload": true, "note": "Deload — reduce volume ~50%" }
  ]
}

RULES:
• This is a HYBRID program mixing STRENGTH and ENDURANCE in the same week (concurrent training). Use BOTH "strength" and "endurance" session types. Follow the user's requested split of disciplines across the week. Place hard runs and heavy lifts on separate days where possible; keep easy aerobic work around the lifting. Strength split: Total Body.
• dayMap: EXACTLY 7 entries (Mon→Sun). EXACTLY 6 of them are non-null session ids; the rest are null. Every non-null id MUST exist in "sessions". Distribute training days sensibly across the week.
• Define enough unique "sessions" to fill those 6 weekly slots (reuse an id on multiple days only if the session truly repeats).
• weeklyProgressions: EXACTLY 7 entries (weeks 1–6 working, week 7 has "deload": true). "setsAdd" (strength) cumulates from 0.
• Keep it realistic and specific. Every session needs concrete targets a trainee can execute and log.
prompt.user:
Generate the Hybrid (strength + endurance) program.
Primary goal / weekly structure (user's words): HYROX Pro sub-75 — high-end compromised running, heavy sled and wall-ball capacity, 3 quality runs + 2 strength + 1 race simulation, strong concurrent-training management.
Strength methodology: Juggernaut Training Systems
Strength split: Total Body
Total sessions/week: 6
Working weeks: 6 + 1 deload week (total 7)

program.name: Hybrid Block
program.progression: Volume rises weekly, deload last week.

concurrencyFlags: Wed→Thu: hard run adjacent to strength
Thu→Fri: hard run adjacent to strength
